title: trisetum michelii
intro: Trisetum michelii, also known as Michel's hair grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Africa, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever and pain, as well as treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. The herbal preparation of Trisetum michelii typically involves making a tea from the leaves and roots, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
